scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/hig-doctor/src-termcast typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/hig-doctor/src-mcp typecheck && bun run --cwd website typecheck
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/hig-doctor/src-termcast build && bun run --cwd packages/hig-doctor/src-mcp build && bun run --cwd website build
scripts.smoke: node packages/hig-doctor/src/cli.js . --score && node packages/hig-doctor/src/cli.js . --strict && bun packages/hig-doctor/src-termcast/src/cli.ts website --json && node scripts/smoke-mcp.mjs
scripts.test: bun run test:validator && bun run test:audit && bun run test:mcp && bun run test:website && bun run test:guards && bun run smoke
